children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall promulgate such regulations as are necessary to implement programs under this chapter, including such regulations as the Secretary determines to be necessary to ensure a fair and reasonable application of the limitations established under .section 3844(f) of this title
shall be carried out without regard to chapter 35 of title 44 (commonly known as the Paperwork Reduction Act); and
shall be made as an interim rule effective on publication with an opportunity for notice and comment.

children.heading: Congressional review of agency rulemaking
children.label: c Congressional review of agency rulemaking
children.text: In promulgating regulations under this section, the Secretary shall use the authority provided under .section 808 of title 5
